content: The differing performance profiles of intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM), random network distillation (RND), and heuristic curious agents can act as a labeled 'intrinsic curiosity benchmark' to actively prune and select memory architectures for 2024–2025 SOTA active learning agents, rather than tuning memory on sparse extrinsic reward signals alone. This creates a self-supervised cycle where variable curiosity drives targeted memory architecture search, instead of memory being a fixed component for curious exploration.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
